// --- BACKEND SCRIPT PARTS ---

const BACKEND_CORE = `
// =========================================================
// GOOGLE APPS SCRIPT FOR SAFETY CHECK PRO
// =========================================================

/**
 * !!! IMPORTANT: EMAIL AUTHORIZATION !!!
 * After pasting this code, select the function 'setupScopeAuthorization'
 * from the dropdown above and click 'Run'. 
 * You MUST authorize "Compose and send email" when prompted.
 * Then Deploy as New Version.
 */

function doPost(e) {
  const lock = LockService.getScriptLock();
  lock.tryLock(10000);

  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet();
    const body = JSON.parse(e.postData.contents);
    const action = body.action;

    // --- AUTHENTICATION HANDLERS ---
    if (action === 'login') return handleLogin(ss, body);
    if (action === 'register_user') return handleRegisterUser(ss, body);
    if (action === 'get_users') return handleGetUsers(ss);
    if (action === 'delete_user') return handleDeleteUser(ss, body);
    if (action === 'update_user') return handleUpdateUser(ss, body);
    
    // --- ACKNOWLEDGEMENT HANDLERS ---
    if (action === 'acknowledge_issue') return handleAcknowledgeIssue(ss, body);
    if (action === 'get_acknowledgements') return handleGetAcknowledgements(ss);

    // --- SYSTEM NOTIFICATION HANDLERS ---
    if (action === 'mark_notification_read') return handleMarkNotificationRead(ss, body);

    // --- SYSTEM SETTINGS HANDLERS ---
    if (action === 'update_settings') return handleUpdateSettings(ss, body);

    // --- SUBSCRIPTION HANDLERS ---
    if (action === 'check_subscription') return handleCheckSubscription(ss);
    if (action === 'extend_subscription') return handleExtendSubscription(ss, body);

    // --- SUPPORT HANDLERS ---
    if (action === 'submit_support_ticket') return handleSubmitSupport(ss, body);

    // --- DATA HANDLERS ---
    const sheetName = body.sheet;
    const headers = body.headers;
    const rowData = body.row;

    // 1. Get or Create Sheet
    let sheet = ss.getSheetByName(sheetName);
    if (!sheet) {
      sheet = ss.insertSheet(sheetName);
      if (headers && Array.isArray(headers)) {
        sheet.appendRow(headers);
        sheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, headers.length).setFontWeight("bold");
        sheet.setFrozenRows(1);
      }
    }

    // 2. Append Data
    const safeRow = rowData.map(r => (r === null || r === undefined) ? "" : String(r));
    sheet.appendRow(safeRow);

    // 3. AUTO-UPDATE VALIDATION LISTS
    if (sheetName !== 'System_Settings' && sheetName !== 'Validation_Data' && sheetName !== 'Users' && sheetName !== 'Acknowledgements' && sheetName !== 'SystemNotification' && sheetName !== 'Subscription_Data' && sheetName !== 'Support_Tickets') {
       updateValidationData(ss, body);
       
       // 4. SEND EMAIL NOTIFICATIONS (if enabled)
       try {
          sendEmailNotifications(ss, body, sheetName);
       } catch (emailErr) {
          handleLog(ss, "EMAIL_FAILURE", "CRITICAL: " + emailErr.toString());
       }
    }

    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", sheet: sheetName }))
      .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);

  } catch (err) {
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: err.toString() }))
      .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
  } finally {
    lock.releaseLock();
  }
}

function doGet(e) {
  const ss = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet();
  const sheets = ss.getSheets();
  const data = {};

  sheets.forEach(sheet => {
    const name = sheet.getName();
    if (name === 'Users') return;
    
    const lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
    
    if (name === 'Validation_Data') {
       if (lastRow > 1) {
          const range = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, sheet.getLastColumn());
          const values = range.getValues();
          const columns = {};
          const headers = sheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, sheet.getLastColumn()).getValues()[0];
          
          headers.forEach((h, colIndex) => {
             columns[h] = values.map(row => row[colIndex]).filter(c => c !== "");
             columns[h] = [...new Set(columns[h])]; 
          });
          data[name] = columns;
       } else {
          data[name] = {};
       }
    } else if (name === 'Acknowledgements') {
        if (lastRow > 1) {
             const values = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 1).getValues(); 
             data[name] = values.flat();
        } else {
             data[name] = [];
        }
    } else if (name === 'System_Settings') {
        if (lastRow > 0) {
             const values = sheet.getRange(1, 1, lastRow, sheet.getLastColumn()).getValues();
             data[name] = values;
        } else {
             data[name] = [];
        }
    } else if (name === 'Subscription_Data') {
        // Expose subscription data in GET
        if (lastRow > 1) {
             const values = sheet.getRange(lastRow, 1, 1, 4).getValues()[0];
             data[name] = { status: values[0], plan: values[1], expiryDate: values[2] };
        } else {
             data[name] = null;
        }
    } else {
       if (lastRow > 0) {
          const startRow = Math.max(1, lastRow - 200);
          const numRows = lastRow - startRow + 1;
          const values = sheet.getRange(startRow, 1, numRows, sheet.getLastColumn()).getValues();
          if (startRow > 1) {
             const header = sheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, sheet.getLastColumn()).getValues();
             values.unshift(header[0]);
          }
          data[name] = values;
       } else {
          data[name] = [];
       }
    }
  });

  return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify(data))
    .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

// --- PERMISSION FORCE FUNCTION ---
function setupScopeAuthorization() {
  console.log("Forcing scope authorization...");
  const me = Session.getActiveUser().getEmail();
  
  // Forces: https://www.googleapis.com/auth/script.send_mail
  MailApp.getRemainingDailyQuota();
  // Forces: https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.send
  try { GmailApp.getAliases(); } catch(e) {} 
  
  try {
    GmailApp.sendEmail(me, "Auth Check", "If you receive this, permissions are correct.");
  } catch(e) {
    console.log("Authorization trigger attempted. Please authorize script.");
  }

  try {
    GmailApp.createDraft("me", "Authorization Test", "Body");
  } catch(e) {}

  console.log("Scopes should now be detected. Deploy as new version.");
}

// --- LOGGING HELPER ---
function handleLog(ss, action, details) {
    let logSheet = ss.getSheetByName('System_Logs');
    if (!logSheet) {
        logSheet = ss.insertSheet('System_Logs');
        logSheet.appendRow(["Timestamp", "Action", "Details"]);
        logSheet.setFrozenRows(1);
    }
    logSheet.appendRow([new Date(), action, details]);
}
`;

const BACKEND_AUTH = `
function handleLogin(ss, body) {
    const username = body.username ? String(body.username).trim().toLowerCase() : "";
    const password = body.password ? String(body.password) : "";

    let userSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Users');
    
    if (!userSheet || userSheet.getLastRow() <= 1) {
        return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", code: "NO_USERS", message: "No users found in database." }))
          .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
    }

    const data = userSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
        const row = data[i];
        if (String(row[0]).trim().toLowerCase() === username && String(row[1]) === password) {
             let prefs = {};
             try {
                 if (row[6]) prefs = JSON.parse(row[6]);
             } catch(e) {}

             const user = {
                 username: row[0],
                 name: row[2],
                 role: String(row[3]).trim(), 
                 position: row[4] || '',
                 preferences: prefs
             };
             
             userSheet.getRange(i + 1, 6).setValue(new Date().toISOString());
             
             return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", user: user }))
                .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
        }
    }

    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", code: "INVALID_CREDENTIALS", message: "Invalid username or password." }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleRegisterUser(ss, body) {
    let userSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Users');
    if (!userSheet) {
        userSheet = ss.insertSheet('Users');
        userSheet.appendRow(["Username", "Password", "Name", "Role", "Position", "Last_Login", "Preferences"]);
        userSheet.setFrozenRows(1);
        userSheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, 7).setFontWeight("bold");
    }

    const username = body.username ? String(body.username).trim().toLowerCase() : "";
    
    const data = userSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    for(let i=1; i<data.length; i++) {
        if(String(data[i][0]).trim().toLowerCase() === username) {
             return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "Username already exists." }))
                .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
        }
    }

    const defaultPrefs = JSON.stringify({
        emailNotifications: true,
        notifyGeneral: true,
        notifyPetroleum: true,
        notifyPetroleumV2: true,
        notifyAcid: true
    });

    userSheet.appendRow([
        username,
        body.password,
        body.name,
        String(body.role).trim(), 
        body.position || "", 
        new Date().toISOString(),
        defaultPrefs
    ]);
    
    if (body.name) {
         updateValidationSingle(ss, 'Inspector_Name', body.name);
    }
    if (body.position) {
         updateValidationSingle(ss, 'Position', body.position);
    }

    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", message: "User created." }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleUpdateUser(ss, body) {
    let userSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Users');
    if (!userSheet) return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "Database not found." })).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);

    const currentUsername = body.originalUsername ? String(body.originalUsername).trim().toLowerCase() : String(body.username).trim().toLowerCase();
    
    const data = userSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    
    for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
        if (String(data[i][0]).trim().toLowerCase() === currentUsername) {
            
            if (body.username && String(body.username).trim().toLowerCase() !== currentUsername) {
                 userSheet.getRange(i + 1, 1).setValue(String(body.username).trim().toLowerCase());
            }

            if (body.name) userSheet.getRange(i + 1, 3).setValue(body.name);
            if (body.role) userSheet.getRange(i + 1, 4).setValue(String(body.role).trim());
            if (body.position !== undefined) userSheet.getRange(i + 1, 5).setValue(body.position);
            
            if (body.preferences) {
                userSheet.getRange(i + 1, 7).setValue(JSON.stringify(body.preferences));
            }
            
            if (body.password && String(body.password).trim() !== "") {
                 userSheet.getRange(i + 1, 2).setValue(body.password);
            }
            
            if (body.name) updateValidationSingle(ss, 'Inspector_Name', body.name);
            if (body.position) updateValidationSingle(ss, 'Position', body.position);

            return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", message: "User updated." }))
                .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
        }
    }
    
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "User not found." }))
        .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleGetUsers(ss) {
    let userSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Users');
    if (!userSheet) {
        return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", users: [] }))
            .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
    }
    
    const data = userSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    const users = [];
    for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
        const row = data[i];
        if (row[0]) {
            let prefs = {};
            try {
               if(row[6]) prefs = JSON.parse(row[6]);
            } catch(e){}

            users.push({
                username: row[0],
                password: row[1],
                name: row[2],
                role: String(row[3]).trim(), 
                position: row[4],
                lastLogin: row[5],
                preferences: prefs
            });
        }
    }
    
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", users: users }))
        .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleDeleteUser(ss, body) {
    let userSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Users');
    if (!userSheet) return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "Database not found." })).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);

    const username = body.username ? String(body.username).trim().toLowerCase() : "";
    const data = userSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    
    for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
        if (String(data[i][0]).trim().toLowerCase() === username) {
            userSheet.deleteRow(i + 1);
            return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", message: "User deleted." }))
                .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
        }
    }
    
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "User not found." }))
        .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}
`;

const BACKEND_DATA = `
function handleAcknowledgeIssue(ss, body) {
    let ackSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Acknowledgements');
    if (!ackSheet) {
        ackSheet = ss.insertSheet('Acknowledgements');
        ackSheet.appendRow(['Issue_ID', 'Acknowledged_By', 'Role', 'Timestamp']);
        ackSheet.setFrozenRows(1);
        ackSheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, 4).setFontWeight('bold');
    }
    
    const issueId = String(body.issueId);
    const data = ackSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    const isExists = data.some(row => String(row[0]) === issueId);
    
    if (!isExists) {
         ackSheet.appendRow([
            issueId,
            body.user || 'Unknown',
            body.role || 'Unknown',
            new Date().toISOString()
        ]);
    }

    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", message: "Issue acknowledged." }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleGetAcknowledgements(ss) {
    let ackSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Acknowledgements');
    if (!ackSheet) {
         return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", ids: [] }))
            .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
    }
    
    const data = ackSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    const ids = [];
    for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
        if (data[i][0]) ids.push(String(data[i][0]));
    }
    
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", ids: ids }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleMarkNotificationRead(ss, body) {
    const sheet = ss.getSheetByName('SystemNotification');
    if (!sheet) return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "Notification sheet not found" })).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
    
    const idToMark = String(body.id);
    const data = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    
    for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
        if (String(data[i][0]) === idToMark) {
            sheet.getRange(i + 1, 6).setValue("TRUE");
            return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", message: "Marked as read" }))
                .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
        }
    }
    
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "ID not found" }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

    if (!settingsSheet) {
        settingsSheet = ss.insertSheet('System_Settings');
        settingsSheet.appendRow(["CompanyName", "ManagerEmail", "UpdatedBy", "Timestamp", "LogoBase64", "MobileApkLink", "WebAppUrl"]);
        settingsSheet.setFrozenRows(1);
        settingsSheet.getRange(1,1,1,7).setFontWeight('bold');
    }
    
    settingsSheet.appendRow([
        body.companyName,
        body.managerEmail,
        "System",
        new Date().toISOString(),
        body.companyLogo || "",
        body.mobileApkLink || "",
        body.webAppUrl || ""
    ]);
    
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", message: "Settings updated" }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleCheckSubscription(ss) {
    let subSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Subscription_Data');
    
    // Auto-create if not exists
    if (!subSheet) {
        subSheet = ss.insertSheet('Subscription_Data');
        subSheet.appendRow(["Status", "Plan", "Expiry_Date", "Last_Updated"]);
        subSheet.setFrozenRows(1);
        subSheet.getRange(1,1,1,4).setFontWeight('bold');
    }
    
    // Self-Healing: If sheet exists but has no data rows (only header), force create a default row
    if (subSheet.getLastRow() < 2) {
        const defaultExpiry = new Date();
        defaultExpiry.setDate(defaultExpiry.getDate() + 30); // 30 Day Trial
        subSheet.appendRow(["Active", "Trial", defaultExpiry.toISOString(), new Date().toISOString()]);
    }
    
    // Read Status
    const lastRow = subSheet.getLastRow();
    // Double check we have a row now
    if (lastRow > 1) {
        const data = subSheet.getRange(lastRow, 1, 1, 4).getValues()[0];
        
        let status = data[0];
        const expiryStr = data[2];
        const expiry = new Date(expiryStr);
        const now = new Date();
        
        // Check real expiration against system time
        if (status === 'Active' && !isNaN(expiry.getTime()) && now > expiry) {
            status = 'Expired';
            subSheet.getRange(lastRow, 1).setValue('Expired'); // Update DB
        }
        
        return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ 
            status: "success", 
            subscription: {
                status: status,
                plan: data[1],
                expiryDate: expiryStr,
                daysRemaining: Math.ceil((expiry.getTime() - now.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24))
            }
        })).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
    }
    
    // Fallback if somehow still empty (should be impossible with self-healing)
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "No subscription data found" }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleExtendSubscription(ss, body) {
    let subSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Subscription_Data');
    
    // 1. Create Sheet if missing
    if (!subSheet) {
        subSheet = ss.insertSheet('Subscription_Data');
        subSheet.appendRow(["Status", "Plan", "Expiry_Date", "Last_Updated"]);
        subSheet.setFrozenRows(1);
        subSheet.getRange(1,1,1,4).setFontWeight('bold');
    }
    
    // 2. Self-Healing: Insert row if missing (Critical Fix)
    if (subSheet.getLastRow() < 2) {
        const expiredDate = new Date();
        expiredDate.setDate(expiredDate.getDate() - 1); // Start as expired so extension works from 'now'
        subSheet.appendRow(["Expired", "Trial", expiredDate.toISOString(), new Date().toISOString()]);
    }
    
    const daysToAdd = parseInt(body.days || 30);
    const lastRow = subSheet.getLastRow();
    
    if (lastRow > 1) {
        const range = subSheet.getRange(lastRow, 1, 1, 4);
        const currentData = range.getValues()[0];
        
        let currentExpiryStr = currentData[2];
        let currentExpiry = new Date(currentExpiryStr);
        const now = new Date();
        
        // If date is invalid or already expired, start extension from TODAY
        if (!currentExpiryStr || isNaN(currentExpiry.getTime()) || currentExpiry < now) {
            currentExpiry = now;
        }
        
        // Add days
        currentExpiry.setDate(currentExpiry.getDate() + daysToAdd);
        
        // Update Sheet
        subSheet.getRange(lastRow, 1).setValue('Active');
        subSheet.getRange(lastRow, 3).setValue(currentExpiry.toISOString());
        subSheet.getRange(lastRow, 4).setValue(new Date().toISOString());
        
        return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", message: "Subscription Extended" }))
           .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
    }
    
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "Failed to update subscription. Row missing." }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleSubmitSupport(ss, body) {
    let ticketSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Support_Tickets');
    if (!ticketSheet) {
        ticketSheet = ss.insertSheet('Support_Tickets');
        ticketSheet.appendRow(["Ticket_ID", "Type", "Subject", "Description", "Priority", "User", "Email", "Role", "Timestamp", "Status"]);
        ticketSheet.setFrozenRows(1);
        ticketSheet.getRange(1,1,1,10).setFontWeight('bold');
    }
    
    const ticketId = "TKT-" + Math.floor(1000 + Math.random() * 9000);
    
    ticketSheet.appendRow([
        ticketId,
        body.type,
        body.subject,
        body.description,
        body.priority,
        body.user,
        body.email,
        body.role,
        new Date().toISOString(),
        "Open"
    ]);
    
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", ticketId: ticketId }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function updateValidationData(ss, body) {
  try {
     const row = body.row;
     const sheetName = body.sheet;
     
     let truck, trailer, driver, inspector, location;
     
     if (sheetName === 'General') {
         truck = row[2]; trailer = row[3]; inspector = row[4]; driver = row[5]; location = row[6];
     } else {
         truck = row[2]; trailer = row[3]; location = row[5]; inspector = row[7]; driver = row[8];
     }
     
     updateValidationSingle(ss, 'Truck_Reg_No', truck);
     updateValidationSingle(ss, 'Trailer_Reg_No', trailer);
     updateValidationSingle(ss, 'Driver_Name', driver);
     updateValidationSingle(ss, 'Inspector_Name', inspector);
     updateValidationSingle(ss, 'Location', location);
     
  } catch (e) {
  }
}

function updateValidationSingle(ss, headerName, value) {
     if (!value || String(value).trim() === "") return;
     const valStr = String(value).trim();
     
     let vSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Validation_Data');
     if (!vSheet) {
        vSheet = ss.insertSheet('Validation_Data');
        vSheet.appendRow(['Truck_Reg_No', 'Trailer_Reg_No', 'Driver_Name', 'Inspector_Name', 'Location', 'Position']);
        vSheet.setFrozenRows(1);
        vSheet.getRange(1,1,1,6).setFontWeight('bold');
     }
     
     const headers = vSheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, vSheet.getLastColumn()).getValues()[0];
     let colIndex = headers.indexOf(headerName) + 1;
     
     if (colIndex < 1) {
         colIndex = headers.length + 1;
         vSheet.getRange(1, colIndex).setValue(headerName);
         vSheet.getRange(1, colIndex).setFontWeight('bold');
     }

     const fullCol = vSheet.getRange(1, colIndex, vSheet.getMaxRows(), 1).getValues().flat().map(String);
     if (!fullCol.includes(valStr)) {
         let targetRow = 1;
         for(let i=1; i<fullCol.length; i++) {
             if(fullCol[i] === "") {
                 targetRow = i + 1;
                 break;
             }
         }
         if (targetRow === 1) targetRow = vSheet.getLastRow() + 1;
         vSheet.getRange(targetRow, colIndex).setValue(valStr);
     }
}
`;

export const BACKEND_SCRIPT_TEMPLATE = BACKEND_CORE + BACKEND_AUTH + BACKEND_DATA + BACKEND_PDF + BACKEND_EMAIL;

// --- BACKEND SCRIPT PARTS ---

const BACKEND_CORE = `
// =========================================================
// GOOGLE APPS SCRIPT FOR SAFETY CHECK PRO
// =========================================================

/**
 * !!! IMPORTANT: EMAIL AUTHORIZATION !!!
 * After pasting this code, select the function 'setupScopeAuthorization'
 * from the dropdown above and click 'Run'. 
 * You MUST authorize "Compose and send email" when prompted.
 * Then Deploy as New Version.
 */

function doPost(e) {
  const lock = LockService.getScriptLock();
  lock.tryLock(10000);

  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet();
    const body = JSON.parse(e.postData.contents);
    const action = body.action;

    // --- AUTHENTICATION HANDLERS ---
    if (action === 'login') return handleLogin(ss, body);
    if (action === 'register_user') return handleRegisterUser(ss, body);
    if (action === 'get_users') return handleGetUsers(ss);
    if (action === 'delete_user') return handleDeleteUser(ss, body);
    if (action === 'update_user') return handleUpdateUser(ss, body);
    
    // --- ACKNOWLEDGEMENT HANDLERS ---
    if (action === 'acknowledge_issue') return handleAcknowledgeIssue(ss, body);
    if (action === 'get_acknowledgements') return handleGetAcknowledgements(ss);

    // --- SYSTEM NOTIFICATION HANDLERS ---
    if (action === 'mark_notification_read') return handleMarkNotificationRead(ss, body);

    // --- SYSTEM SETTINGS HANDLERS ---
    if (action === 'update_settings') return handleUpdateSettings(ss, body);

    // --- SUBSCRIPTION HANDLERS ---
    if (action === 'check_subscription') return handleCheckSubscription(ss);
    if (action === 'extend_subscription') return handleExtendSubscription(ss, body);

    // --- SUPPORT HANDLERS ---
    if (action === 'submit_support_ticket') return handleSubmitSupport(ss, body);

    // --- DATA HANDLERS ---
    const sheetName = body.sheet;
    const headers = body.headers;
    const rowData = body.row;

    // 1. Get or Create Sheet
    let sheet = ss.getSheetByName(sheetName);
    if (!sheet) {
      sheet = ss.insertSheet(sheetName);
      if (headers && Array.isArray(headers)) {
        sheet.appendRow(headers);
        sheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, headers.length).setFontWeight("bold");
        sheet.setFrozenRows(1);
      }
    }

    // 2. Append Data
    const safeRow = rowData.map(r => (r === null || r === undefined) ? "" : String(r));
    sheet.appendRow(safeRow);

    // 3. AUTO-UPDATE VALIDATION LISTS
    if (sheetName !== 'System_Settings' && sheetName !== 'Validation_Data' && sheetName !== 'Users' && sheetName !== 'Acknowledgements' && sheetName !== 'SystemNotification' && sheetName !== 'Subscription_Data' && sheetName !== 'Support_Tickets') {
       updateValidationData(ss, body);
       
       // 4. SEND EMAIL NOTIFICATIONS (if enabled)
       try {
          sendEmailNotifications(ss, body, sheetName);
       } catch (emailErr) {
          handleLog(ss, "EMAIL_FAILURE", "CRITICAL: " + emailErr.toString());
       }
    }

    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", sheet: sheetName }))
      .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);

  } catch (err) {
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: err.toString() }))
      .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
  } finally {
    lock.releaseLock();
  }
}

function doGet(e) {
  const ss = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet();
  const sheets = ss.getSheets();
  const data = {};

  sheets.forEach(sheet => {
    const name = sheet.getName();
    if (name === 'Users') return;
    
    const lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
    
    if (name === 'Validation_Data') {
       if (lastRow > 1) {
          const range = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, sheet.getLastColumn());
          const values = range.getValues();
          const columns = {};
          const headers = sheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, sheet.getLastColumn()).getValues()[0];
          
          headers.forEach((h, colIndex) => {
             columns[h] = values.map(row => row[colIndex]).filter(c => c !== "");
             columns[h] = [...new Set(columns[h])]; 
          });
          data[name] = columns;
       } else {
          data[name] = {};
       }
    } else if (name === 'Acknowledgements') {
        if (lastRow > 1) {
             const values = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 1).getValues(); 
             data[name] = values.flat();
        } else {
             data[name] = [];
        }
    } else if (name === 'System_Settings') {
        if (lastRow > 0) {
             const values = sheet.getRange(1, 1, lastRow, sheet.getLastColumn()).getValues();
             data[name] = values;
        } else {
             data[name] = [];
        }
    } else if (name === 'Subscription_Data') {
        // Expose subscription data in GET
        if (lastRow > 1) {
             const values = sheet.getRange(lastRow, 1, 1, 4).getValues()[0];
             data[name] = { status: values[0], plan: values[1], expiryDate: values[2] };
        } else {
             data[name] = null;
        }
    } else {
       if (lastRow > 0) {
          const startRow = Math.max(1, lastRow - 200);
          const numRows = lastRow - startRow + 1;
          const values = sheet.getRange(startRow, 1, numRows, sheet.getLastColumn()).getValues();
          if (startRow > 1) {
             const header = sheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, sheet.getLastColumn()).getValues();
             values.unshift(header[0]);
          }
          data[name] = values;
       } else {
          data[name] = [];
       }
    }
  });

  return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify(data))
    .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

// --- PERMISSION FORCE FUNCTION ---
function setupScopeAuthorization() {
  console.log("Forcing scope authorization...");
  const me = Session.getActiveUser().getEmail();
  
  // Forces: https://www.googleapis.com/auth/script.send_mail
  MailApp.getRemainingDailyQuota();
  // Forces: https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.send
  try { GmailApp.getAliases(); } catch(e) {} 
  
  try {
    GmailApp.sendEmail(me, "Auth Check", "If you receive this, permissions are correct.");
  } catch(e) {
    console.log("Authorization trigger attempted. Please authorize script.");
  }

  try {
    GmailApp.createDraft("me", "Authorization Test", "Body");
  } catch(e) {}

  console.log("Scopes should now be detected. Deploy as new version.");
}

// --- LOGGING HELPER ---
function handleLog(ss, action, details) {
    let logSheet = ss.getSheetByName('System_Logs');
    if (!logSheet) {
        logSheet = ss.insertSheet('System_Logs');
        logSheet.appendRow(["Timestamp", "Action", "Details"]);
        logSheet.setFrozenRows(1);
    }
    logSheet.appendRow([new Date(), action, details]);
}
`;

const BACKEND_AUTH = `
function handleLogin(ss, body) {
    const username = body.username ? String(body.username).trim().toLowerCase() : "";
    const password = body.password ? String(body.password) : "";

    let userSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Users');
    
    if (!userSheet || userSheet.getLastRow() <= 1) {
        return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", code: "NO_USERS", message: "No users found in database." }))
          .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
    }

    const data = userSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
        const row = data[i];
        if (String(row[0]).trim().toLowerCase() === username && String(row[1]) === password) {
             let prefs = {};
             try {
                 if (row[6]) prefs = JSON.parse(row[6]);
             } catch(e) {}

             const user = {
                 username: row[0],
                 name: row[2],
                 role: String(row[3]).trim(), 
                 position: row[4] || '',
                 preferences: prefs
             };
             
             userSheet.getRange(i + 1, 6).setValue(new Date().toISOString());
             
             return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", user: user }))
                .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
        }
    }

    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", code: "INVALID_CREDENTIALS", message: "Invalid username or password." }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleRegisterUser(ss, body) {
    let userSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Users');
    if (!userSheet) {
        userSheet = ss.insertSheet('Users');
        userSheet.appendRow(["Username", "Password", "Name", "Role", "Position", "Last_Login", "Preferences"]);
        userSheet.setFrozenRows(1);
        userSheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, 7).setFontWeight("bold");
    }

    const username = body.username ? String(body.username).trim().toLowerCase() : "";
    
    const data = userSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    for(let i=1; i<data.length; i++) {
        if(String(data[i][0]).trim().toLowerCase() === username) {
             return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "Username already exists." }))
                .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
        }
    }

    const defaultPrefs = JSON.stringify({
        emailNotifications: true,
        notifyGeneral: true,
        notifyPetroleum: true,
        notifyPetroleumV2: true,
        notifyAcid: true
    });

    userSheet.appendRow([
        username,
        body.password,
        body.name,
        String(body.role).trim(), 
        body.position || "", 
        new Date().toISOString(),
        defaultPrefs
    ]);
    
    if (body.name) {
         updateValidationSingle(ss, 'Inspector_Name', body.name);
    }
    if (body.position) {
         updateValidationSingle(ss, 'Position', body.position);
    }

    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", message: "User created." }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleUpdateUser(ss, body) {
    let userSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Users');
    if (!userSheet) return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "Database not found." })).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);

    const currentUsername = body.originalUsername ? String(body.originalUsername).trim().toLowerCase() : String(body.username).trim().toLowerCase();
    
    const data = userSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    
    for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
        if (String(data[i][0]).trim().toLowerCase() === currentUsername) {
            
            if (body.username && String(body.username).trim().toLowerCase() !== currentUsername) {
                 userSheet.getRange(i + 1, 1).setValue(String(body.username).trim().toLowerCase());
            }

            if (body.name) userSheet.getRange(i + 1, 3).setValue(body.name);
            if (body.role) userSheet.getRange(i + 1, 4).setValue(String(body.role).trim());
            if (body.position !== undefined) userSheet.getRange(i + 1, 5).setValue(body.position);
            
            if (body.preferences) {
                userSheet.getRange(i + 1, 7).setValue(JSON.stringify(body.preferences));
            }
            
            if (body.password && String(body.password).trim() !== "") {
                 userSheet.getRange(i + 1, 2).setValue(body.password);
            }
            
            if (body.name) updateValidationSingle(ss, 'Inspector_Name', body.name);
            if (body.position) updateValidationSingle(ss, 'Position', body.position);

            return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", message: "User updated." }))
                .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
        }
    }
    
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "User not found." }))
        .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleGetUsers(ss) {
    let userSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Users');
    if (!userSheet) {
        return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", users: [] }))
            .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
    }
    
    const data = userSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    const users = [];
    for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
        const row = data[i];
        if (row[0]) {
            let prefs = {};
            try {
               if(row[6]) prefs = JSON.parse(row[6]);
            } catch(e){}

            users.push({
                username: row[0],
                password: row[1],
                name: row[2],
                role: String(row[3]).trim(), 
                position: row[4],
                lastLogin: row[5],
                preferences: prefs
            });
        }
    }
    
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", users: users }))
        .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleDeleteUser(ss, body) {
    let userSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Users');
    if (!userSheet) return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "Database not found." })).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);

    const username = body.username ? String(body.username).trim().toLowerCase() : "";
    const data = userSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    
    for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
        if (String(data[i][0]).trim().toLowerCase() === username) {
            userSheet.deleteRow(i + 1);
            return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", message: "User deleted." }))
                .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
        }
    }
    
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "User not found." }))
        .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}
`;

const BACKEND_DATA = `
function handleAcknowledgeIssue(ss, body) {
    let ackSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Acknowledgements');
    if (!ackSheet) {
        ackSheet = ss.insertSheet('Acknowledgements');
        ackSheet.appendRow(['Issue_ID', 'Acknowledged_By', 'Role', 'Timestamp']);
        ackSheet.setFrozenRows(1);
        ackSheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, 4).setFontWeight('bold');
    }
    
    const issueId = String(body.issueId);
    const data = ackSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    const isExists = data.some(row => String(row[0]) === issueId);
    
    if (!isExists) {
         ackSheet.appendRow([
            issueId,
            body.user || 'Unknown',
            body.role || 'Unknown',
            new Date().toISOString()
        ]);
    }

    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", message: "Issue acknowledged." }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleGetAcknowledgements(ss) {
    let ackSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Acknowledgements');
    if (!ackSheet) {
         return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", ids: [] }))
            .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
    }
    
    const data = ackSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    const ids = [];
    for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
        if (data[i][0]) ids.push(String(data[i][0]));
    }
    
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", ids: ids }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleMarkNotificationRead(ss, body) {
    const sheet = ss.getSheetByName('SystemNotification');
    if (!sheet) return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "Notification sheet not found" })).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
    
    const idToMark = String(body.id);
    const data = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    
    for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
        if (String(data[i][0]) === idToMark) {
            sheet.getRange(i + 1, 6).setValue("TRUE");
            return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", message: "Marked as read" }))
                .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
        }
    }
    
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "ID not found" }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleUpdateSettings(ss, body) {
    let settingsSheet = ss.getSheetByName('System_Settings');
    if (!settingsSheet) {
        settingsSheet = ss.insertSheet('System_Settings');
        settingsSheet.appendRow(["CompanyName", "ManagerEmail", "UpdatedBy", "Timestamp", "LogoBase64", "MobileApkLink", "WebAppUrl"]);
        settingsSheet.setFrozenRows(1);
        settingsSheet.getRange(1,1,1,7).setFontWeight('bold');
    }
    
    settingsSheet.appendRow([
        body.companyName,
        body.managerEmail,
        "System",
        new Date().toISOString(),
        body.companyLogo || "",
        body.mobileApkLink || "",
        body.webAppUrl || ""
    ]);
    
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", message: "Settings updated" }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleCheckSubscription(ss) {
    let subSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Subscription_Data');
    
    // Auto-create if not exists
    if (!subSheet) {
        subSheet = ss.insertSheet('Subscription_Data');
        subSheet.appendRow(["Status", "Plan", "Expiry_Date", "Last_Updated"]);
        subSheet.setFrozenRows(1);
        subSheet.getRange(1,1,1,4).setFontWeight('bold');
    }
    
    // Self-Healing: If sheet exists but has no data rows (only header), force create a default row
    if (subSheet.getLastRow() < 2) {
        const defaultExpiry = new Date();
        defaultExpiry.setDate(defaultExpiry.getDate() + 30); // 30 Day Trial
        subSheet.appendRow(["Active", "Trial", defaultExpiry.toISOString(), new Date().toISOString()]);
    }
    
    // Read Status
    const lastRow = subSheet.getLastRow();
    // Double check we have a row now
    if (lastRow > 1) {
        const data = subSheet.getRange(lastRow, 1, 1, 4).getValues()[0];
        
        let status = data[0];
        const expiryStr = data[2];
        const expiry = new Date(expiryStr);
        const now = new Date();
        
        // Check real expiration against system time
        if (status === 'Active' && !isNaN(expiry.getTime()) && now > expiry) {
            status = 'Expired';
            subSheet.getRange(lastRow, 1).setValue('Expired'); // Update DB
        }
        
        return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ 
            status: "success", 
            subscription: {
                status: status,
                plan: data[1],
                expiryDate: expiryStr,
                daysRemaining: Math.ceil((expiry.getTime() - now.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24))
            }
        })).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
    }
    
    // Fallback if somehow still empty (should be impossible with self-healing)
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "No subscription data found" }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleExtendSubscription(ss, body) {
    let subSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Subscription_Data');
    
    // 1. Create Sheet if missing
    if (!subSheet) {
        subSheet = ss.insertSheet('Subscription_Data');
        subSheet.appendRow(["Status", "Plan", "Expiry_Date", "Last_Updated"]);
        subSheet.setFrozenRows(1);
        subSheet.getRange(1,1,1,4).setFontWeight('bold');
    }
    
    // 2. Self-Healing: Insert row if missing (Critical Fix)
    if (subSheet.getLastRow() < 2) {
        const expiredDate = new Date();
        expiredDate.setDate(expiredDate.getDate() - 1); // Start as expired so extension works from 'now'
        subSheet.appendRow(["Expired", "Trial", expiredDate.toISOString(), new Date().toISOString()]);
    }
    
    const daysToAdd = parseInt(body.days || 30);
    const lastRow = subSheet.getLastRow();
    
    if (lastRow > 1) {
        const range = subSheet.getRange(lastRow, 1, 1, 4);
        const currentData = range.getValues()[0];
        
        let currentExpiryStr = currentData[2];
        let currentExpiry = new Date(currentExpiryStr);
        const now = new Date();
        
        // If date is invalid or already expired, start extension from TODAY
        if (!currentExpiryStr || isNaN(currentExpiry.getTime()) || currentExpiry < now) {
            currentExpiry = now;
        }
        
        // Add days
        currentExpiry.setDate(currentExpiry.getDate() + daysToAdd);
        
        // Update Sheet
        subSheet.getRange(lastRow, 1).setValue('Active');
        subSheet.getRange(lastRow, 3).setValue(currentExpiry.toISOString());
        subSheet.getRange(lastRow, 4).setValue(new Date().toISOString());
        
        return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", message: "Subscription Extended" }))
           .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
    }
    
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "Failed to update subscription. Row missing." }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleSubmitSupport(ss, body) {
    let ticketSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Support_Tickets');
    if (!ticketSheet) {
        ticketSheet = ss.insertSheet('Support_Tickets');
        ticketSheet.appendRow(["Ticket_ID", "Type", "Subject", "Description", "Priority", "User", "Email", "Role", "Timestamp", "Status"]);
        ticketSheet.setFrozenRows(1);
        ticketSheet.getRange(1,1,1,10).setFontWeight('bold');
    }
    
    const ticketId = "TKT-" + Math.floor(1000 + Math.random() * 9000);
    
    ticketSheet.appendRow([
        ticketId,
        body.type,
        body.subject,
        body.description,
        body.priority,
        body.user,
        body.email,
        body.role,
        new Date().toISOString(),
        "Open"
    ]);
    
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", ticketId: ticketId }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function updateValidationData(ss, body) {
  try {
     const row = body.row;
     const sheetName = body.sheet;
     
     let truck, trailer, driver, inspector, location;
     
     if (sheetName === 'General') {
         truck = row[2]; trailer = row[3]; inspector = row[4]; driver = row[5]; location = row[6];
     } else {
         truck = row[2]; trailer = row[3]; location = row[5]; inspector = row[7]; driver = row[8];
     }
     
     updateValidationSingle(ss, 'Truck_Reg_No', truck);
     updateValidationSingle(ss, 'Trailer_Reg_No', trailer);
     updateValidationSingle(ss, 'Driver_Name', driver);
     updateValidationSingle(ss, 'Inspector_Name', inspector);
     updateValidationSingle(ss, 'Location', location);
     
  } catch (e) {
  }
}

function updateValidationSingle(ss, headerName, value) {
     if (!value || String(value).trim() === "") return;
     const valStr = String(value).trim();
     
     let vSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Validation_Data');
     if (!vSheet) {
        vSheet = ss.insertSheet('Validation_Data');
        vSheet.appendRow(['Truck_Reg_No', 'Trailer_Reg_No', 'Driver_Name', 'Inspector_Name', 'Location', 'Position']);
        vSheet.setFrozenRows(1);
        vSheet.getRange(1,1,1,6).setFontWeight('bold');
     }
     
     const headers = vSheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, vSheet.getLastColumn()).getValues()[0];
     let colIndex = headers.indexOf(headerName) + 1;
     
     if (colIndex < 1) {
         colIndex = headers.length + 1;
         vSheet.getRange(1, colIndex).setValue(headerName);
         vSheet.getRange(1, colIndex).setFontWeight('bold');
     }

     const fullCol = vSheet.getRange(1, colIndex, vSheet.getMaxRows(), 1).getValues().flat().map(String);
     if (!fullCol.includes(valStr)) {
         let targetRow = 1;
         for(let i=1; i<fullCol.length; i++) {
             if(fullCol[i] === "") {
                 targetRow = i + 1;
                 break;
             }
         }
         if (targetRow === 1) targetRow = vSheet.getLastRow() + 1;
         vSheet.getRange(targetRow, colIndex).setValue(valStr);
     }
}
`;

const BACKEND_PDF = `
function createPdf(data) {
  var html = "<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><style>" +
    "body{font-family:Helvetica,sans-serif;padding:20px;color:#333}" +
    "h1{color:#2563eb;border-bottom:2px solid #e5e7eb;padding-bottom:10px;margin-bottom:20px}" +
    ".grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:20px;background:#f9fafb;padding:15px;border-radius:8px}" +
    ".item{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;border-bottom:1px solid #f3f4f6;padding:8px 0}" +
    ".status{font-weight:bold;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:0.8em}" +
    ".bad{color:#dc2626}.good{color:#16a34a}.attn{color:#d97706}.nil{color:#9ca3af}" +
    "</style></head><body>";

  html += "<h1>" + (data.title || "Inspection Report") + "</h1>";
  
  html += "<div class='grid'>";
  html += "<div><strong>Vehicle:</strong> " + (data.truckNo || "-") + "</div>";
  html += "<div><strong>Trailer:</strong> " + (data.trailerNo || "-") + "</div>";
  html += "<div><strong>Job Card:</strong> " + (data.jobCard || "-") + "</div>";
  html += "<div><strong>Driver:</strong> " + (data.driverName || "-") + "</div>";
  html += "<div><strong>Inspector:</strong> " + (data.inspectedBy || "-") + "</div>";
  html += "<div><strong>Date:</strong> " + (data.timestamp ? new Date(data.timestamp).toLocaleString() : "-") + "</div>";
  html += "<div><strong>Location:</strong> " + (data.location || "-") + "</div>";
  html += "<div><strong>Odometer:</strong> " + (data.odometer || "-") + "</div>";
  html += "</div>";

  html += "<h3>Checklist</h3>";
  if (data.items && data.items.length) {
    data.items.forEach(function(item) {
      var s = item.status || "Nil";
      var cls = "nil";
      if (s === 'Good') cls = "good";
      if (s === 'Bad') cls = "bad";
      if (s === 'Needs Attention') cls = "attn";
      
      html += "<div class='item'>";
      html += "<span>" + item.label + "</span>";
      html += "<span class='status " + cls + "'>" + s + "</span>";
      html += "</div>";
    });
  }

  html += "<h3>Summary</h3>";
  html += "<p><strong>Rating:</strong> " + (data.rate || "-") + "/5</p>";
  html += "<p><strong>Remarks:</strong> " + (data.remarks || "None") + "</p>";
  
  html += "<p style='font-size:10px;color:#999;margin-top:30px;border-top:1px solid #eee;padding-top:10px'>Generated by SafetyCheck Pro</p>";
  html += "</body></html>";

  var blob = Utilities.newBlob(html, "text/html", "report.html");
  var pdf = blob.getAs("application/pdf");
  pdf.setName("Report_" + (data.truckNo || "Vehicle") + "_" + new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10) + ".pdf");
  return pdf;
}
`;

const BACKEND_EMAIL = `
function sendEmailNotifications(ss, body, sheetName) {
  try {
    var settingsSheet = ss.getSheetByName('System_Settings');
    if (!settingsSheet) return;
    
    var lastRow = settingsSheet.getLastRow();
    if (lastRow < 2) return; // No settings
    
    // Assumes Col B (index 1) is ManagerEmail
    var email = settingsSheet.getRange(lastRow, 2).getValue(); 
    if (!email || email === "") return;

    var reportData = body.reportData;
    if (!reportData) return;

    var subject = "Inspection Report: " + (reportData.truckNo || "Unknown");
    if (reportData.rate <= 2) subject = "URGENT [FAIL]: " + subject;
    else if (reportData.rate == 3) subject = "ATTENTION: " + subject;
    else subject = "SUCCESS: " + subject;

    var message = "A new inspection has been submitted.\\n\\n";
    message += "Vehicle: " + reportData.truckNo + "\\n";
    message += "Inspector: " + reportData.inspectedBy + "\\n";
    message += "Result: " + reportData.rate + "/5\\n";
    message += "Remarks: " + reportData.remarks + "\\n\\n";
    message += "Attached is the PDF report.";

    var pdf = createPdf(reportData);
    
    MailApp.sendEmail({
      to: email,
      subject: subject,
      body: message,
      attachments: [pdf]
    });
    
  } catch (e) {
    handleLog(ss, "EMAIL_ERROR", e.toString());
    console.error(e);
  }
}
`;

export const BACKEND_SCRIPT_TEMPLATE = BACKEND_CORE + BACKEND_AUTH + BACKEND_DATA + BACKEND_PDF + BACKEND_EMAIL;

To answer your question: The links are being saved from the **`SettingsView.tsx`** component, specifically within the **"Company Profile & App Links"** card which is visible only to the SuperAdmin.

Here is the data flow:
1.  **Input:** The SuperAdmin enters the links in the inputs in `SettingsView`.
2.  **Processing:** The `handleSaveSettings` function in `useSettings.ts` collects these values.
3.  **Transmission:** It sends a POST request to your Google Apps Script with `action: 'update_settings'`.
4.  **Storage:** The Google Apps Script (in `constants.ts`, function `handleUpdateSettings`) saves them to the **`System_Settings`** sheet in **Column F (Mobile Link)** and **Column G (Web Link)**.

I have refined the **Settings View** below to make it crystal clear to the SuperAdmin that these inputs control the "Share" card seen by other users.

To implement the professional share feature and demo credentials display in the Support Hub, I have updated two files: `App.tsx` and `views/SupportView.tsx`.

### **Specification of Changes**

1.  **`App.tsx`**:
    *   Updated the `SupportView` component usage to pass the `settings` prop. This allows the Support view to access the App Link and Web URL configured in the system settings.

2.  **`views/SupportView.tsx`**:
    *   **Interface Update**: Added `settings` to `SupportViewProps`.
    *   **Share Logic**: Implemented `handleProfessionalShare` which utilizes the native `navigator.share` API (the "system share sheet") if available. This provides the most professional native experience on mobile devices.
    *   **Share Content**: Constructed a share message that includes the Company Name, Web Portal Link, Mobile App Link, and the requested **Demo User Login Details**.
    *   **UI Redesign**: Replaced the previous generic "Referral" card with a **"Share System Access"** card styled with a dark professional theme.
    *   **Demo Credentials Display**: Added a dedicated visual block within the Share card showing `User: admin` and `Pass: 123456` clearly, satisfying the request to add demo login details.
    *   **Granular Actions**: Added specific buttons to "Copy APK Link" and "Copy Web Link" for manual distribution.

### **Code Changes**

I'm focusing on ensuring it's efficient, intuitive, and seamlessly integrated.


**Mapping Key Interactions**

I've identified key interactions: comments/feedback and status changes managed by admins. User notifications for ticket updates and superadmin alerts for new tickets are crucial. I'm leveraging the existing architecture: React frontend, Google Apps Script backend, and the Google Sheets data model. I'm focusing on efficiently storing comment history within the flat `Support_Tickets` sheet by appending a JSON string.


**Designing Ticket Management**

I'm now focusing on specific functionality: user and admin ticket views, status indicators, and detailed conversation views. "My Tickets" will filter for users, and admins see everything. I'll utilize a modal or expanded section for conversation details. Updated types and backend scripts are the next steps, creating handleGetTickets and handleUpdateTicket functions with the necessary filtering and JSON parsing of comments.


**Defining Core Functionality**

I'm now prioritizing backend updates, particularly `handleUpdateTicket`. This function will pinpoint the correct ticket row using the ID, then append the user's comment to the existing JSON. Simultaneously, the ticket status will be updated, ensuring corresponding notifications are triggered via the `SystemNotification` sheet. My immediate next steps are to refine the `SupportView.tsx` component, introducing necessary state variables for ticket data, selected tickets, and reply text.

I'm focused on the UI elements: "Submit Request" section, a "My Support Tickets" list, and a modal that shows each ticket's chat, status control, and reply input. I'm visualizing the list items with ID, subject, status badge, and last update. Bubble-style chat design for clarity. Admins need controls, such as a status dropdown. My aim is to efficiently render updates with the correct interactions.


**Finalizing Backend & UI**

I'm now focusing on finalizing the backend and UI. I've designed the `handleUpdateTicket` function, meticulously following a step-by-step process. First, I locate the relevant row, then retrieve and parse the existing comments. I append the new comment, serialize it back to JSON, and save it. Concurrently, the ticket status is updated and a notification is created in the `SystemNotification` sheet. On the frontend, I'm opting for a "Track Tickets" tab for a more professional feel. I'm updating `types.ts` with `SupportTicket` and `TicketComment` interfaces, and adding `handleGetTickets` and `handleUpdateTicket` to `BACKEND_DATA` in `constants.ts`.


**Building Core Components**

I'm now focusing on integrating the backend with the frontend and further refining the notification logic. I'm adding `fetchTickets`, `handleReply`, and `handleStatusChange` to `SupportView.tsx`.  I'm also working on building the user interface, incorporating both a professional ticket list view and a detailed conversation interface.  The backend script updates now include schema verification for the `Comments` column. My next steps are refining notification recipients based on user role and comment type. I'm moving toward implementing and testing these components.


**Optimizing User Flow**

I'm now revisiting the UI for a more polished experience. I've decided to streamline the design by replacing the list view with a modal for detailed ticket conversations, enhancing usability.  I'm also ensuring the notification system works seamlessly, confirming the backend correctly writes to the `SystemNotification` sheet as originally planned. I'm leveraging Tailwind CSS for a professional visual appeal. My focus is on delivering a clean and intuitive user interface that meets all the specified requirements.

To implement a professional Support Ticket Tracking system with bidirectional feedback and targeted notifications, I will update the **Types**, the **Backend Script**, and the **Support View**.

### **Specification of Changes**

1.  **`types.ts`**:
    *   Add `TicketComment` interface to structure conversation history.
    *   Add `SupportTicket` interface to define the full ticket object structure including the new `comments` array.

2.  **`constants.ts` (Backend Script)**:
    *   **Schema Update**: Update `handleSubmitSupport` to include a `Comments` column (Column 11) in the `Support_Tickets` sheet.
    *   **New Function `handleGetTickets`**:
        *   If the requester is an Admin/SuperAdmin, returns **all** tickets.
        *   If the requester is a User, returns only **their** tickets.
        *   Parses the stored JSON string in the 'Comments' column into an array.
    *   **New Function `handleUpdateTicket`**:
        *   Accepts a new comment or status change.
        *   Updates the specific row in Google Sheets.
        *   **Smart Notification Logic**:
            *   If a **User** replies, it creates a `SystemNotification` targeting 'Admin' role.
            *   If an **Admin** replies, it creates a `SystemNotification` targeting the specific Ticket Owner.

3.  **`views/SupportView.tsx`**:
    *   **Navigation Tabs**: Split the view into "Submit Request" and "My Tickets".
    *   **Ticket List**: A clean, status-coded list of tickets showing ID, Subject, Status, and Last Update.
    *   **Ticket Detail/Conversation UI**:
        *   A chat-like interface for the feedback loop.
        *   Admins see a "Status" dropdown to resolve/close tickets.
        *   Users and Admins can type and send replies.
        *   Visual distinction between "My Messages" (right aligned) and "Support Responses" (left aligned).

### **Code Changes**

entries.description: Added SupportTicket and TicketComment interfaces for feedback tracking.
Updated backend script to handle ticket fetching, comment updates, and targeted notifications.

// --- BACKEND SCRIPT PARTS ---

const BACKEND_CORE = `
// =========================================================
// GOOGLE APPS SCRIPT FOR SAFETY CHECK PRO
// =========================================================

/**
 * !!! IMPORTANT: EMAIL AUTHORIZATION !!!
 * After pasting this code, select the function 'setupScopeAuthorization'
 * from the dropdown above and click 'Run'. 
 * You MUST authorize "Compose and send email" when prompted.
 * Then Deploy as New Version.
 */

function doPost(e) {
  const lock = LockService.getScriptLock();
  lock.tryLock(10000);

  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet();
    const body = JSON.parse(e.postData.contents);
    const action = body.action;

    // --- AUTHENTICATION HANDLERS ---
    if (action === 'login') return handleLogin(ss, body);
    if (action === 'register_user') return handleRegisterUser(ss, body);
    if (action === 'get_users') return handleGetUsers(ss);
    if (action === 'delete_user') return handleDeleteUser(ss, body);
    if (action === 'update_user') return handleUpdateUser(ss, body);
    
    // --- ACKNOWLEDGEMENT HANDLERS ---
    if (action === 'acknowledge_issue') return handleAcknowledgeIssue(ss, body);
    if (action === 'get_acknowledgements') return handleGetAcknowledgements(ss);

    // --- SYSTEM NOTIFICATION HANDLERS ---
    if (action === 'mark_notification_read') return handleMarkNotificationRead(ss, body);

    // --- SYSTEM SETTINGS HANDLERS ---
    if (action === 'update_settings') return handleUpdateSettings(ss, body);

    // --- SUBSCRIPTION HANDLERS ---
    if (action === 'check_subscription') return handleCheckSubscription(ss);
    if (action === 'extend_subscription') return handleExtendSubscription(ss, body);

    // --- SUPPORT HANDLERS ---
    if (action === 'submit_support_ticket') return handleSubmitSupport(ss, body);
    if (action === 'get_tickets') return handleGetTickets(ss, body);
    if (action === 'update_ticket') return handleUpdateTicket(ss, body);

    // --- DATA HANDLERS ---
    const sheetName = body.sheet;
    const headers = body.headers;
    const rowData = body.row;

    // 1. Get or Create Sheet
    let sheet = ss.getSheetByName(sheetName);
    if (!sheet) {
      sheet = ss.insertSheet(sheetName);
      if (headers && Array.isArray(headers)) {
        sheet.appendRow(headers);
        sheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, headers.length).setFontWeight("bold");
        sheet.setFrozenRows(1);
      }
    }

    // 2. Append Data
    const safeRow = rowData.map(r => (r === null || r === undefined) ? "" : String(r));
    sheet.appendRow(safeRow);

    // 3. AUTO-UPDATE VALIDATION LISTS
    if (sheetName !== 'System_Settings' && sheetName !== 'Validation_Data' && sheetName !== 'Users' && sheetName !== 'Acknowledgements' && sheetName !== 'SystemNotification' && sheetName !== 'Subscription_Data' && sheetName !== 'Support_Tickets') {
       updateValidationData(ss, body);
       
       // 4. SEND EMAIL NOTIFICATIONS (if enabled)
       try {
          sendEmailNotifications(ss, body, sheetName);
       } catch (emailErr) {
          handleLog(ss, "EMAIL_FAILURE", "CRITICAL: " + emailErr.toString());
       }
    }

    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", sheet: sheetName }))
      .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);

  } catch (err) {
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: err.toString() }))
      .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
  } finally {
    lock.releaseLock();
  }
}

function doGet(e) {
  const ss = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet();
  const sheets = ss.getSheets();
  const data = {};

  sheets.forEach(sheet => {
    const name = sheet.getName();
    if (name === 'Users') return;
    
    const lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
    
    if (name === 'Validation_Data') {
       if (lastRow > 1) {
          const range = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, sheet.getLastColumn());
          const values = range.getValues();
          const columns = {};
          const headers = sheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, sheet.getLastColumn()).getValues()[0];
          
          headers.forEach((h, colIndex) => {
             columns[h] = values.map(row => row[colIndex]).filter(c => c !== "");
             columns[h] = [...new Set(columns[h])]; 
          });
          data[name] = columns;
       } else {
          data[name] = {};
       }
    } else if (name === 'Acknowledgements') {
        if (lastRow > 1) {
             const values = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 1).getValues(); 
             data[name] = values.flat();
        } else {
             data[name] = [];
        }
    } else if (name === 'System_Settings') {
        if (lastRow > 0) {
             const values = sheet.getRange(1, 1, lastRow, sheet.getLastColumn()).getValues();
             data[name] = values;
        } else {
             data[name] = [];
        }
    } else if (name === 'Subscription_Data') {
        // Expose subscription data in GET
        if (lastRow > 1) {
             const values = sheet.getRange(lastRow, 1, 1, 4).getValues()[0];
             data[name] = { status: values[0], plan: values[1], expiryDate: values[2] };
        } else {
             data[name] = null;
        }
    } else {
       if (lastRow > 0) {
          const startRow = Math.max(1, lastRow - 200);
          const numRows = lastRow - startRow + 1;
          const values = sheet.getRange(startRow, 1, numRows, sheet.getLastColumn()).getValues();
          if (startRow > 1) {
             const header = sheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, sheet.getLastColumn()).getValues();
             values.unshift(header[0]);
          }
          data[name] = values;
       } else {
          data[name] = [];
       }
    }
  });

  return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify(data))
    .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

// --- PERMISSION FORCE FUNCTION ---
function setupScopeAuthorization() {
  console.log("Forcing scope authorization...");
  const me = Session.getActiveUser().getEmail();
  
  // Forces: https://www.googleapis.com/auth/script.send_mail
  MailApp.getRemainingDailyQuota();
  // Forces: https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.send
  try { GmailApp.getAliases(); } catch(e) {} 
  
  try {
    GmailApp.sendEmail(me, "Auth Check", "If you receive this, permissions are correct.");
  } catch(e) {
    console.log("Authorization trigger attempted. Please authorize script.");
  }

  try {
    GmailApp.createDraft("me", "Authorization Test", "Body");
  } catch(e) {}

  console.log("Scopes should now be detected. Deploy as new version.");
}

// --- LOGGING HELPER ---
function handleLog(ss, action, details) {
    let logSheet = ss.getSheetByName('System_Logs');
    if (!logSheet) {
        logSheet = ss.insertSheet('System_Logs');
        logSheet.appendRow(["Timestamp", "Action", "Details"]);
        logSheet.setFrozenRows(1);
    }
    logSheet.appendRow([new Date(), action, details]);
}
`;

const BACKEND_AUTH = `
function handleLogin(ss, body) {
    const username = body.username ? String(body.username).trim().toLowerCase() : "";
    const password = body.password ? String(body.password) : "";

    let userSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Users');
    
    if (!userSheet || userSheet.getLastRow() <= 1) {
        return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", code: "NO_USERS", message: "No users found in database." }))
          .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
    }

    const data = userSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
        const row = data[i];
        if (String(row[0]).trim().toLowerCase() === username && String(row[1]) === password) {
             let prefs = {};
             try {
                 if (row[6]) prefs = JSON.parse(row[6]);
             } catch(e) {}

             const user = {
                 username: row[0],
                 name: row[2],
                 role: String(row[3]).trim(), 
                 position: row[4] || '',
                 preferences: prefs
             };
             
             userSheet.getRange(i + 1, 6).setValue(new Date().toISOString());
             
             return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", user: user }))
                .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
        }
    }

    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", code: "INVALID_CREDENTIALS", message: "Invalid username or password." }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleRegisterUser(ss, body) {
    let userSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Users');
    if (!userSheet) {
        userSheet = ss.insertSheet('Users');
        userSheet.appendRow(["Username", "Password", "Name", "Role", "Position", "Last_Login", "Preferences"]);
        userSheet.setFrozenRows(1);
        userSheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, 7).setFontWeight("bold");
    }

    const username = body.username ? String(body.username).trim().toLowerCase() : "";
    
    const data = userSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    for(let i=1; i<data.length; i++) {
        if(String(data[i][0]).trim().toLowerCase() === username) {
             return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "Username already exists." }))
                .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
        }
    }

    const defaultPrefs = JSON.stringify({
        emailNotifications: true,
        notifyGeneral: true,
        notifyPetroleum: true,
        notifyPetroleumV2: true,
        notifyAcid: true
    });

    userSheet.appendRow([
        username,
        body.password,
        body.name,
        String(body.role).trim(), 
        body.position || "", 
        new Date().toISOString(),
        defaultPrefs
    ]);
    
    if (body.name) {
         updateValidationSingle(ss, 'Inspector_Name', body.name);
    }
    if (body.position) {
         updateValidationSingle(ss, 'Position', body.position);
    }

    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", message: "User created." }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleUpdateUser(ss, body) {
    let userSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Users');
    if (!userSheet) return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "Database not found." })).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);

    const currentUsername = body.originalUsername ? String(body.originalUsername).trim().toLowerCase() : String(body.username).trim().toLowerCase();
    
    const data = userSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    
    for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
        if (String(data[i][0]).trim().toLowerCase() === currentUsername) {
            
            if (body.username && String(body.username).trim().toLowerCase() !== currentUsername) {
                 userSheet.getRange(i + 1, 1).setValue(String(body.username).trim().toLowerCase());
            }

            if (body.name) userSheet.getRange(i + 1, 3).setValue(body.name);
            if (body.role) userSheet.getRange(i + 1, 4).setValue(String(body.role).trim());
            if (body.position !== undefined) userSheet.getRange(i + 1, 5).setValue(body.position);
            
            if (body.preferences) {
                userSheet.getRange(i + 1, 7).setValue(JSON.stringify(body.preferences));
            }
            
            if (body.password && String(body.password).trim() !== "") {
                 userSheet.getRange(i + 1, 2).setValue(body.password);
            }
            
            if (body.name) updateValidationSingle(ss, 'Inspector_Name', body.name);
            if (body.position) updateValidationSingle(ss, 'Position', body.position);

            return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", message: "User updated." }))
                .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
        }
    }
    
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "User not found." }))
        .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleGetUsers(ss) {
    let userSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Users');
    if (!userSheet) {
        return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", users: [] }))
            .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
    }
    
    const data = userSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    const users = [];
    for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
        const row = data[i];
        if (row[0]) {
            let prefs = {};
            try {
               if(row[6]) prefs = JSON.parse(row[6]);
            } catch(e){}

            users.push({
                username: row[0],
                password: row[1],
                name: row[2],
                role: String(row[3]).trim(), 
                position: row[4],
                lastLogin: row[5],
                preferences: prefs
            });
        }
    }
    
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", users: users }))
        .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleDeleteUser(ss, body) {
    let userSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Users');
    if (!userSheet) return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "Database not found." })).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);

    const username = body.username ? String(body.username).trim().toLowerCase() : "";
    const data = userSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    
    for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
        if (String(data[i][0]).trim().toLowerCase() === username) {
            userSheet.deleteRow(i + 1);
            return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", message: "User deleted." }))
                .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
        }
    }
    
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "User not found." }))
        .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}
`;

const BACKEND_DATA = `
function handleAcknowledgeIssue(ss, body) {
    let ackSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Acknowledgements');
    if (!ackSheet) {
        ackSheet = ss.insertSheet('Acknowledgements');
        ackSheet.appendRow(['Issue_ID', 'Acknowledged_By', 'Role', 'Timestamp']);
        ackSheet.setFrozenRows(1);
        ackSheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, 4).setFontWeight('bold');
    }
    
    const issueId = String(body.issueId);
    const data = ackSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    const isExists = data.some(row => String(row[0]) === issueId);
    
    if (!isExists) {
         ackSheet.appendRow([
            issueId,
            body.user || 'Unknown',
            body.role || 'Unknown',
            new Date().toISOString()
        ]);
    }

    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", message: "Issue acknowledged." }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleGetAcknowledgements(ss) {
    let ackSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Acknowledgements');
    if (!ackSheet) {
         return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", ids: [] }))
            .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
    }
    
    const data = ackSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    const ids = [];
    for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
        if (data[i][0]) ids.push(String(data[i][0]));
    }
    
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", ids: ids }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleMarkNotificationRead(ss, body) {
    const sheet = ss.getSheetByName('SystemNotification');
    if (!sheet) return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "Notification sheet not found" })).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
    
    const idToMark = String(body.id);
    const data = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    
    for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
        if (String(data[i][0]) === idToMark) {
            sheet.getRange(i + 1, 6).setValue("TRUE");
            return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", message: "Marked as read" }))
                .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
        }
    }
    
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "error", message: "ID not found" }))
       .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

function handleUpdateSettings(ss, body) {
    let settingsSheet = ss.getSheetByName('System_Settings');
    if (!settingsSheet) {
        settingsSheet = ss.insertSheet('System_Settings');
        settingsSheet.appendRow(["CompanyName", "ManagerEmail", "UpdatedBy", "Timestamp", "LogoBase64", "MobileApkLink", "WebAppUrl"]);
